label: Provenance Minimum Set
description: Minimum provenance fields required for legal defensibility and auditability.
usageNotes: These are minimum mandatory fields, not the full provenance model.
Each field name aligns with the runtime provenance schema.

entries.label: Source System
entries.description: System or workflow from which the artifact was captured or derived.

entries.label: Captured By
entries.description: Actor, service account or curator responsible for capture.

entries.label: Chain of Custody
entries.description: Ordered custody trail preserving traceability from source to normalized artifact.

entries.label: License Status
entries.description: Usage entitlement status for the underlying evidence source.

entries.label: Attestation Status
entries.description: Whether curation or source authenticity has been attested.

entries.label: Review Policy
entries.description: Governance policy applied to review and approval.

entries.label: Effective From
entries.description: Date from which the artifact version is active.

entries.label: Status
entries.description: Lifecycle status of the artifact version.
